$comment: First-party curated marketplace catalog (CP-FR-020 issue #621; CP-FR-021 issue #622). The catalog is a SIGNED envelope: `signature` is a base64 detached ed25519 signature over the canonical bytes of `payload` (see server/services/marketplace-integrity.ts), verified at load against the bundled first-party public key. The server fails closed (zero listings) on any signature mismatch. Each entry carries an `integrity` content digest (sha256-<hex> over the staged package), checked after staging and before commit; `revoked: true` removes an entry from listings and blocks install/update. The current `integrity` values are placeholders pending real per-plugin package sources (sources point at the monorepo root, which has no per-plugin manifest at the clone root); computing real digests and adding an end-to-end test is tracked by #689. `verified` is a display-only curation flag. There is no third-party submission path: entries are added by maintainers only. After editing this file you MUST re-sign it (pipe the ed25519 private-key PEM in on stdin): npx tsx server/scripts/sign-marketplace-catalog.ts < /path/to/ed25519-priv.pem

entries.name: Database
entries.summary: Docker-backed databases via compose, with migrations and connection-string templating.

entries.name: Process
entries.summary: Long-running commands: dev servers, watchers, and workers, with setup and env handling.

entries.name: Redis
entries.summary: A Redis cache component: brings up a Redis container and exposes its connection string.

entries.name: GitHub.com
entries.summary: Connect GitHub issues, projects, and code-scanning alerts to your benches.

entries.name: GitHub Enterprise
entries.summary: Integration for self-hosted GitHub Enterprise Server: PAT plus instance URL auth with optional self-signed TLS opt-in.

entries.name: Self-hosted Jira
entries.summary: Integration for self-hosted Atlassian Jira (Data Center 8.14+) with PAT auth and configurable link-type mapping.

entries.name: Worker Queue
entries.summary: A background worker-queue component. Revoked: withdrawn by Roubo maintainers.
